ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "designator" TEXT /* Designator of the component on the PCB */,
  "footprint" TEXT /* Footprint of the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component in stock */,
  "manufacturer_part" TEXT /* Manufacturer part number */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "supplier_part" TEXT /* Supplier part number */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the component */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions required for the component */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Last date the component was inspected for quality */,
  "inspection_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of inspection for the component */,
  "min_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level to prevent stockouts */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level to trigger a reorder */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for procurement */,
  "criticality" TEXT /* Criticality of the component in production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the manufacturer */,
  "quality_rating" INTEGER /* Quality rating of components provided by the manufacturer */,
  "reliability_rating" INTEGER /* Reliability rating of the manufacturer */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Average lead time for components from the manufacturer */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the supplier */,
  "quality_rating" INTEGER /* Quality rating of components provided by the supplier */,
  "reliability_rating" INTEGER /* Reliability rating of the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Average lead time for components from the supplier */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., purchase, delivery, usage) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity involved in the event */,
  "purchase_order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase order (if applicable) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project (if applicable) */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the component */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the event occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_history_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_history_purchase_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_order_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("purchase_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_history_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_history_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES inventory_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "purchase_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, received) */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date of the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "purchase_order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase order */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the component */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the item */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date for the item */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the item (e.g., shipped, received, backordered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_purchase_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_order_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("purchase_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, planned) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the project */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_components" (
  "project_component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project component entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "quantity_used" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component used in the project */,
  "expected_usage_date" TEXT /* Expected date when the component will be used */,
  "actual_usage_date" TEXT /* Actual date when the component was used */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the component usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_components_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_components_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., procurement manager, inventory manager, production engineer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the user was hired */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., component, purchase order, project) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the inventory site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the inventory site */,
  "warehouse_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse manager */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the site */,
  "current_capacity" INTEGER /* Current capacity of the site */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_sites_warehouse_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_inventory" (
  "site_inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site inventory entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory site */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component at the site */,
  "last_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Last date the inventory was checked */,
  "next_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Next date the inventory will be checked */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_inventory_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_inventory_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES inventory_sites ("site_id")
)
